name: Rubrik Cloud Data Management REST API
what_it_does: Rubrik cloud data management REST API for IT operations, data protection teams, and security engineers to manage backup policies, orchestrate data recovery, monitor data estate health, detect ransomware threats, and automate cyber resilience — enabling automated backup orchestration, recovery validation, ransomware detection, data classification, and cloud data management across hybrid and multi-cloud environments through Rubrik's Security Cloud platform. Enables AI agents to manage backup policy for workload backup schedule and SLA configuration automation, handle recovery orchestration for VM, database, and file recovery automation, access snapshot management for backup snapshot lifecycle and retention automation, retrieve ransomware detection for threat hunt and anomaly identification automation, manage data classification for sensitive data discovery and PII location automation, handle compliance reporting for backup policy audit and SLA compliance automation, access cloud archive for long-term cold storage and archival automation, retrieve replication for cross-site and cross-cloud backup replication automation, manage cluster health for backup infrastructure monitoring automation, and integrate Rubrik with VMware, AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes for multi-cloud data protection automation.
use_cases: Automating backup SLA policy compliance monitoring for enterprise data protection automation agents
Orchestrating VM and database recovery for disaster recovery testing automation agents
Detecting ransomware attacks and anomalous backup behavior for cyber resilience automation agents
Managing cloud archive and long-term retention for data lifecycle compliance automation agents
not_for: Primary storage (Rubrik is data protection and backup, not primary SAN/NAS storage system)
Continuous replication (Rubrik uses snapshot-based backup, not sub-second continuous replication)
Tape backup legacy systems (Rubrik is cloud-native and software-defined, not tape automation)
best_when: An enterprise IT or security team wanting AI agents to automate backup policy enforcement, recovery orchestration, ransomware anomaly detection, and data classification across on-premise and cloud workloads through Rubrik's Security Cloud platform.
avoid_when: RUBRIK CLUSTER OR CLOUD IS REQUIRED: Rubrik API requires Rubrik cluster (on-premise) or Rubrik Security Cloud (SaaS); automated direct storage access assumption creates no_backup_api without Rubrik platform; automated must have Rubrik infrastructure deployed. WORKLOAD AGENTS REQUIRED FOR SOME PROTECTION: Database and application protection requires Rubrik agent installation; automated agentless assumption creates limited_protection for databases without Rubrik agent; automated must deploy Rubrik agents for application-consistent backups. RECOVERY POINT OBJECTIVES AFFECT COMPLIANCE: RPO violations indicate backup failures; automated always-compliant assumption creates missed_SLA for workloads with backup failures; automated must monitor SLA compliance and alert on RPO violations. RANSOMWARE DETECTION IS ML-BASED: Rubrik ransomware detection uses ML anomaly detection; automated certain threat assumption creates false_positive risk for anomalies from legitimate backup behavior changes; automated must tune detection sensitivity for environment baseline.

auth.notes: Rubrik uses OAuth2 + API key for REST and GraphQL API. REST/GraphQL with JSON. San Jose, CA HQ. Founded 2014 by Bipul Sinha. NYSE:RBRK. Products: Rubrik Security Cloud, Cloud Vault, Cyber Recovery, Data Threat Analytics, Data Posture. SDKs: Python, PowerShell, Go. Manages 6+ EB of data. 6,100+ customers. Competes with Commvault, Cohesity, and Veeam for enterprise data protection.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified enterprises; production requires Rubrik subscription or hardware purchase
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by managed data capacity; Rubrik Security Cloud SaaS; appliance purchase + subscription; enterprise custom
pricing.notes: San Jose CA. NYSE:RBRK. Annual subscription. 6,100+ enterprise customers. 6+ EB managed data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; backup and recovery APIs throttled per cluster capacity

known_agent_gotchas: GRAPHQL IS PREFERRED FOR COMPLEX QUERIES: Rubrik GraphQL API enables more efficient queries vs. multiple REST calls; automated REST-only assumption misses query efficiency for complex backup topology queries; automated should prefer Rubrik GraphQL for multi-entity backup data queries

RECOVERY JOBS ARE ASYNCHRONOUS: VM and database recovery operations are asynchronous job executions; automated synchronous recovery assumption creates job_not_complete for long-running recovery operations; automated must poll recovery job status or implement webhook for completion

SLA POLICIES ARE HIERARCHICAL: Rubrik SLAs apply hierarchically (cluster > organization > workload); automated single-level policy assumption creates unexpected_policy_inheritance for workloads inheriting parent SLA; automated must understand SLA hierarchy for policy assignment

SNAPSHOT CATALOG SIZE AFFECTS QUERY PERFORMANCE: Large snapshot catalogs slow search queries; automated instant catalog search assumption creates slow_query for clusters with millions of snapshots; automated must implement pagination and filter optimization for large snapshot catalogs

RANSOMWARE RECOVERY IS CLUSTER-ORCHESTRATED: Rubrik ransomware recovery requires cluster-side orchestration; automated direct-restore assumption creates recovery_failure for ransomware events requiring Rubrik Security Cloud managed recovery; automated must use Rubrik-orchestrated recovery workflow for ransomware incidents
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data protection. SOC2, FedRAMP, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Backup data, workload metadata, and recovery data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cyber resilience. SOC2, FedRAMP, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Backup and data protection metadata.
